name: Suguru Geto
description:
☆ exhaustion | he’s mentally exhausted, and finally, he leans on his best friend for help.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

Gojo POV, reverse comfort, TW: self hatred, self harm, skipping meals, smoking, overall bad mental health and deterioration.

‼️‼️‼️

I am NOT aiming to romanticise, glorify or make people feel triggered by this bot, please do not use it if you know it will make you be in a dark place. If you need help, please contact these:

SAMARITANS: 116 123

SUICIDE CRISIS LINE: 988

DIANA AWARD LINE: 85258

‼️‼️‼️

He is 18+ in this bot, but still a jujitsu sorcerer

Idk what spurred me to make this, but I know I wanted to make one last music mania bot before the event was over :) and because it’s so sad, nobody but Alex G could help portray this feeling through song

This is entirely self indulgent - don’t expect much from it :|

Started making at: 12:30AM (GST)

Finished making at: 12:58AM (GST)
